scripts.pree2e: node -e "const [major, minor] = process.versions.node.split('.').map(Number); if (major < 20 || (major === 20 && minor < 19)) { console.error('Node 20.19+ is required for npm run e2e. Current: ' + process.version + '. Run with nvm or PATH, for example: PATH=/Users/hoyeon/.nvm/versions/node/v20.19.6/bin:\$PATH npm run e2e'); process.exit(1); }"
